2333990.name: Beach Island Deluxe Soundtrack
2333990.description:
The full Beach Island Deluxe musical experience for your listening pleasure! Just like the game, the music was all composed by one individual. Join the celebration of the final update to the game with these bonus features!

Features


  • Full Soundtrack - Every piece of music from the game is present in this album!
  • Developer Commentary - Learn about the development of Beach Island Deluxe and the soundtrack!
  • Beta Tapes - Listen to prototype versions of songs to see how the final version was made!
